description_long: This is a military-style, single-propeller airplane with a camouflage paint scheme and distinctive red accents on the wingtips and nose. The fuselage features detailed markings, including a large white number '36', a red star on the tail, and nose art with a pin-up illustration and Cyrillic script. The wings are straight and low-mounted, with visible ailerons and flaps, and the tail section has a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy, positioned forward on the fuselage, and appears to be single-seat. The landing gear is of the taildragger type, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the overall design suggests a World War II-era fighter aircraft.
description: A camouflaged, single-propeller military airplane with red accents, nose art, and a taildragger landing gear. Features an enclosed forward cockpit and conventional tail design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, red nose, and wide wingspan with red-tipped wingtips.
description_view_1: Left-side perspective highlighting the cockpit canopy, nose art, and large '36' marking on the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, red star insignia, and the taildragger landing gear configuration.
description_view_3: Right-side perspective showing the camouflage pattern, cockpit, and additional markings on the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and red-tipped ends; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a three-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
